task_completion.description: Create or open a tax return for Liam O'Connor in StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open, showing the Personal Information page or a return tab with the name 'Liam O'Connor'.

task_completion.description: Incorporate the T4 (Employment) slip into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The T4 data entry screen in StudioTax is visible with employment income and deductions filled in.

task_completion.description: Incorporate the T4E (EI Sickness) slip into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The T4E data entry screen in StudioTax is visible with Employment Insurance sickness benefit amounts filled in.

task_completion.description: Incorporate the two T5007 slips (WCB and Social Assistance) into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The T5007 data entry screen in StudioTax is visible, showing entries for both Workers' Compensation benefits and Social Assistance payments.

task_completion.description: Incorporate out-of-pocket medical expenses into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Medical Expenses worksheet or corresponding data entry screen in StudioTax is visible with specific expense amounts entered.

task_completion.description: Ensure non-taxable benefits (WCB and Social Assistance) do not improperly increase taxable income.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The T1 General or summary page in StudioTax is visible, showing a deduction on line 25000 (or equivalent 'Other payments deduction') that offsets the T5007 income, ensuring it is removed from Taxable Income.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'liam_oconnor.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer window showing the file being saved as 'liam_oconnor.24t' specifically in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the actual StudioTax 2024 application windows, menus, and forms.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No command Prompt, PowerShell, or terminal windows are visible executing commands to create or modify the '.24t' file directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data into the tax software rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A sequence of screenshots showing navigation through different tax forms (T4, T4E, T5007, Medical) and active data entry, rather than just a final save screen.
